name: hello-world-survey
description: Build the hello-world survey through declarative workflow steps.

steps.run: zwill question add --survey {{ survey }} --question-name favorite_color --question-type multiple_choice --question-text "Which color do you like best?" --question-option red --question-option blue --question-option green

zwill respondent add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r001 && zwill respondent add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r002 && zwill respondent add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r003 && zwill respondent add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r004 && zwill respondent add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r005

zwill answer add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r001 --question favorite_color --answer red && zwill answer add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r002 --question favorite_color --answer blue && zwill answer add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r003 --question favorite_color --answer green && zwill answer add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r004 --question favorite_color --answer blue && zwill answer add --survey {{ survey }} --respondent-id r005 --question favorite_color --answer red
